arts.ttl: Roy Keane tipped for shock Man Utd return that would solve Ruben Amorim problem
arts.sum: Roy Keane recently criticised Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes, but one of his former team-mates believes the club legend could help Ruben Amorim at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim makes 'strange' Europa League admission
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim revealed Manchester United's surprising priorities for this season and the future.

arts.ttl: Man Utd plan to sack Ruben Amorim and hire a dinosaur
arts.sum: Manchester United are considering hiring Max Allegri to replace Ruben Amorim as manager. And Fichajes reports that former Juventus and Milan manager Allegri has jumped to the front of the queue in the list of possible replacements.

arts.ttl: Man United 'eyeing £67m move' for Barcelona's pass master who could be the ideal midfield partner for Manuel Ugarte
arts.sum: Manchester United are allegedly preparing to move for Barcelona midfielder Marc Casado during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Awkward moment £50,000-per-week Manchester United star appears to IGNORE young fan pleading for an autograph and drives off while scrolling on his phone outside Old Trafford
arts.sum: Manchester United star Alejandro Garnacho awkwardly appeared to ignore a young supporter as he drove off from Old Trafford at the weekend.

arts.ttl: Man Utd’s top summer target told he is ‘TOO FAT’
arts.sum: Mike Maignan is Manchester United's top goalkeeping target this summer but he has been told by his AC Milan coach that he is overweight. United have emerged in recent days as favourites to sign Maignan this summer as a replacement for Andre Onana, who has disappointed since arriving from Inter two years ago.

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes alternative Manchester United verdict delivered after damning Roy Keane assessment
arts.sum: Former Manchester United captain Roy Keane was recently critical of Bruno Fernandes

arts.ttl: Five players who could raise Manchester United £157.5m to fund big summer rebuild
arts.sum: Man Utd need to offload a number of players this summer if they want to help improve Ruben Amorim's squad.

arts.ttl: Gittens to pick Arsenal and reject Chelsea, Man Utd: Dortmund star’s big transfer decision
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund’s Jamie Gittens is a wanted man, with the young Englishman coveted by a string of Premier League giants including Arsenal, Chelsea and Manchester United. Jamie Gittens: Why Arsenal are Dortmund star's best option

arts.ttl: Five free agent bargains Manchester United can sign after brutal transfer call
arts.sum: Manchester United chiefs have slashed the club's budget for next season, with free agents now Ruben Amorim's best chance of overhauling his squad in this summer's transfer window
